title: Write ferrum_extlib_dns_secure.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_dns advanced features: Ferrum stdlib has basic net.Resolver but not DoT, DoH, DNSSEC validation, DANE/TLSA, SRV/NAPTR/SVCB/HTTPS record types. Design extlib module: DNS-over-TLS (RFC 7858), DNS-over-HTTPS (RFC 8484), DNSSEC validation with trust anchors, DANE TLSA lookup+caching, full record type set, cancellable async queries, mDNS routing for .local.
